commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And I said, What is it. And he said, This is the basket that goes forth. He said moreover, This is their resemblance through all the earth. Hebrew epha. (Calmet) Eye. This is what they fix their eye upon, or this is a resemblance and figure of them, viz. , of sinners. (Calmet) Protestants, "resemblance. "(Haydock) This is their picture. (Calmet) Septuagint, "wickedness "áunom. (Haydock) U is often mistaken for i. Jerome) Yet here the Septuagint seems equally intelligible, ver.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: This is their eye: This is what they fix their eye upon: or this is a resemblance and figure of them, viz., of sinners.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
